title: Contact - Yvette Cooper MP - Yvette Cooper MP
meta_description: Labour MP for Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley & Altofts and Foreign Secretary
headings: h2: Get in touch with Yvette
text_excerpt: Contact - Yvette Cooper MP - Yvette Cooper MP Skip to main content Yvette Cooper MP Labour MP for Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley & Altofts and Foreign Secretary Join Get Involved Donate About Yvette Contact Latest News Surveys Your views More Menu Contact Contact Yvette Cooper Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley and Altofts Yvette is always available to help residents of Altofts, Airedale, Knottingley, Castleford and Pontefract. Get in touch below or email CooperY@parliament.uk . If you live in the Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley or Altofts constituency, Yvette’s team will be in touch as soon as possible. Not in Yvette Cooper’s constituency? If you are contacting Yvette and you are not in the Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley or Altofts constituency, please contact your own Member of Parliament. Due to strict Parliamentary protocols, only your own Member of Parliament can represent you. You can find them here: Find your MP Foreign Secretary If you are contacting Yvette as Foreign Secretary, then please email fcdo.correspondence@fcdo.gov.uk . Only residents of Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley and Altofts messages can be responded through this website. Get in touch with Yvette Name (Required) First Last House Number/Name Street name Town Postcode Email (Required) Phone Number Send a message to Yvette (Required) What can Yvette help you with? Consent By filling in this form, I agree that my details can be used by Yvette Cooper / the Labour Party. They may communicate occasionally with the latest news on this or other campaigns. We will not share your details with anyone else but if you prefer not to be contacted please email: yvette@yvettecooper.com to be removed from this list. I agree to the privacy policy. Δ Yvette Cooper MP Contact details Office of Yvette Cooper MP Labour Party, Queens Mill 1 Aire Street Castleford WF10 1JL Office of Yvette Cooper MP Labour Party, Queens Mill 1 Aire Street Castleford WF10 1JL '> View on Google Maps Email: yvette@yvettecooper.com Further details Promoted by Peter Box, on behalf of Yvette Cooper MP, both at Queen's Mill, 1 Aire Street, Castleford, WF10 1JL. ©2026 Yvette Cooper.
